prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-TTAHW6CRC-7PC-MED-BL-RD-2PK Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio 7pc Semi Truck Toy Vehicle Transporter with 6 Diecast Toy Cars Playset, Boys Ages 3+ (2-Pack) Description: Calling all little ones with a need for speed.

This awesome 7pc Semi Truck Toy Vehicle Transporter with 6 Diecast Cars Playset from Kidplokio comes with six diecast toy cars that can be easily tucked away into the sides of a larger semi truck transporter toy, making this a super fun 2 in 1 toy car. The larger semi truck toy features two plastic snap closure sidings to ensure all the toy cars stay together after playtime and don't get lost.

The semi hauler toy truck with toy cars is constructed of heavy-duty, durable plastic, meaning it can stand up to lots of everyday playtime wear and tear whether at home, traveling or out at play dates. In addition, playing with a manual truck toy can also help your little one use their imagination, encourage exploration and creativity, sharpen their motor skills and teach them to share with siblings, friends and schoolmates too.

With the toy trucks clever design and easy travel portability, hours of fun playtime for little ones and their friends or siblings await. No batteries or assembly required here.

PLEASE NOTE: This ships as a 2-pack and will include one of truck of each color (red and blue)

Recommended Ages: 3+ Search Terms: toys for boys brother hanukkah christmas gift cosplay roleplay stocking stuffers diecast cars race car truck toys holiday toy list 2022 travel toys fine motor toys Features: - NOTE: Ships as 2 pack (one blue truck, one red truck) - TOY TRUCK WITH RACE CARS: This awesome semi truck toy comes with x6 diecast toy cars that can be tucked away into the sides of the semi truck transporter toy! The semi truck toy features two plastic snap closure sidings to ensure all the piece stay together after playtime - PRETEND PLAY: Kids will have hours of fun with this 2 in 1 toy truck playset, racing cars and driving the large semi truck toy; this playset is also great for cognitive development as kids think up lots of pretend play scenarios, while also working their gross and fine motor skills - TRAVEL FRIENDLY: The kids semi truck toy is constructed of durable plastic, meaning it can stand up to lots of wear and tear in the playroom! The plastic side snap closure and retractable carrier handle make this a great toy to travel with keeping all the components safe and secure - SPECIFICATIONS: 14 x 7 x 5 inches; Colors: Red and Blue (shipment will include one truck of each color); Weight: 1.06lbs; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio 2-Pack Semi Truck Toy with 6 Diecast Cars
